title: Armed Armor Stands
description: A simple plugin that adds arms to armor stands upon right click while holding sticks
body: A simple plugin that adds arms to armor stands upon right click while holding two sticks. ### Config ```yaml messages: prefix: '&6ArmedArmorstands &8» &7' no-permission: '&cYou're not allowed to use this feature!' permission: permission: armorstand.arm # Permission for using the feature required: true # If the permission is required in order to use the feature send-message: true # If a message should be send if you don't have the permission settings: consume-sticks: true # If the sticks should be removed from the player drop-sticks: true # If the 'arms' should drop upon death ``` Developer API (ArmorStandArmEvent) Methods: - getPlayer() - getArmorStand() ```java import net.kettlemc.armedarmorstands.event.ArmorStandArmEvent; public class ArmorStandArmListener implements Listener { @EventHandler public void onArmorStandArm(ArmorStandArmEvent event) { if (event.getArmorStand().getWorld().getName().contains("farmworld")) { event.getPlayer().sendMessage("You are not allowed to use this in the farmworld!"); event.setCancelled(true); } } } ```
